overall.description: Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a drive along elevated highways and overpasses in a futuristic city during golden hour. The camera passes under red monorail tracks, industrial complexes with smokestacks, and curves around highway interchanges with mountains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway beneath red monorail tracks

events.description: purple sports car overtakes on the left side
highway begins gentle curve to the right

agents.ego_description: driving forward on elevated highway passing under red monorail structures and industrial buildings

notable_agents.action: purple sports car overtaking on the left at high speed
black sedan traveling in the same direction

entered.detail: red elevated train track structure with concrete pillars spanning across the highway
large industrial buildings with multiple smokestacks emitting white smoke
multi-lane elevated concrete highway with yellow lane markings and barriers

segments.scene_description: Driving straight on an elevated highway beneath red monorail tracks, with industrial complexes visible to the right. Several vehicles including a purple sports car overtake on the left. The road surface is asphalt with clear lane markings, and the sky is clear blue.

scene_state.functional_zone: curving highway with neon-lit urban buildings

events.description: neon signs become visible on building to the left as the highway curves
road curves significantly to the left, opening view of city skyline

agents.ego_description: navigating a left curve on the elevated highway passing urban structures with neon signage

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving alongside on the left

entered.detail: building with glowing pink and blue neon signs and advertisements
futuristic skyscrapers and towers visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The highway curves left, revealing a building with bright neon signs on the left side. The industrial complex falls behind as the city skyline becomes visible ahead. The elevated monorail track shifts from overhead to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated overpass with highway interchange view

events.description: view opens to reveal complex multi-level highway interchange below
sun becomes visible creating golden hour glare and warm backlighting

agents.ego_description: continuing along curved elevated ramp with expansive view of highway stack interchange below

entered.detail: multi-level highway stack with curved ramps and bridges weaving below
mountain range visible in the background bathed in golden sunlight
silver metal safety railings with horizontal bars along the curve of the overpass

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along a curved overpass revealing a massive highway interchange with multiple levels of ramps below. Metal guardrails line the right side of the road, and distant mountains become visible in the golden afternoon light. The sun creates a warm glare as the vehicle navigates the elevated curve.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along an elevated highway that transitions from an industrial corridor into a sweeping vista of a futuristic city at golden hour. It begins by moving straight beneath red monorail tracks, passing industrial complexes to the right while a purple sports car and other vehicles overtake on the left. As the highway curves left, the industrial zone falls behind and the monorail track shifts to the side, revealing bright neon signs and the emerging city skyline ahead. The scene then expands as the camera navigates a curved overpass, uncovering a massive multi-level highway interchange below. Finally, the view opens toward distant mountains as the lighting shifts into a warm, golden afternoon glare against the metal guardrails.
